think.notes: Reframed from signal engine to trader system. Core gap: no execution playbook exists. Trader needs: (1) explicit entry workflow, (2) position sizing for any capital, (3) exit monitoring system, (4) risk controls, (5) performance tracking. daily_scan.py is a dev tool, not a trader cockpit. Key risk: Friday gap risk (signal close vs actual fill). Recommended: proceed to Research stage to build execution model.

research.notes: Daily vs weekly rebalancing tested. Weekly: CAGR +5.21%, MaxDD -4.75%, 64 trades. Daily(3): CAGR -2.58%, MaxDD -11.35%, 100 trades. Daily(1): CAGR -3.08%, MaxDD -10.13%, 92 trades. Flags: (1) CAGR destroyed with daily, (2) MaxDD 2.4x deeper, (3) trade quality negative, (4) TRENT.NS entered 12x (whipsaw), (5) 62% signal overlap with existing positions, (6) turnover +64%. Verdict: Weekly is optimal. Daily is a trap - more work, worse returns.

classify.notes: Regime analysis complete. KEY FINDING: Strategy is ANTI-FRAGILE. Best in Bear (77.8% WR, +6.46% avg) and Crash (71.4% WR, +7.21% avg). Worst in Bull (25% WR, -0.34% avg). Sideways is volume driver (59% of market time, 36 trades). Strong Bull rare but OK. Signal frequency: Crash=7.5/day, Bear=3.6/day, Sideways=2.0/day, Bull=1.0/day, Strong Bull=1.2/day. Trader checklist defined with regime-based position sizing (Bull: skip/reduce, Sideways/Bear/Crash: full deploy).

design.notes: Complete trader playbook written to TRADER_PLAYBOOK.md. Includes: (1) Account setup requirements, (2) Friday rebalance step-by-step (9:00AM pre-check, 3:20PM entry, 3:30PM confirmation), (3) GTT order setup for profit targets and hard stops, (4) Position sizing formula for any account size (5L-1Cr), (5) Risk management with red flags, (6) Trade journal template, (7) Tax notes (STCG 15%), (8) Performance expectations, (9) Emergency procedures, (10) Quick reference card.

validate.notes: ALL 7 GATES PASSED. Regime-based sizing: CAGR 10.50% (vs baseline 8.76%), Sharpe 0.46, MaxDD -3.76%, Win Rate 63.1%, 65 trades. Stress tests: 2x costs = 8.97% CAGR, missed 1 Fri/month = 9.58%, 5x extreme costs = 3.05%. Regime filter improves returns by skipping bull market trades (25% WR). Trader system is robust to skipped rebalances and higher costs. Recommendation: Full deployment after 1-2 months paper trading.

build.notes: Implemented: (1) REGIME_RULES table in daily_scan.py with 5 regimes (Strong Bull/Bull/Sideways/Bear/Crash), (2) compute_regime() now returns max_positions, action, regime_note, (3) Console output shows recommendation banner with action + max positions, (4) HTML report has regime action banner with Max Positions, Enter Today count, recommendation color-coded, (5) daily_scan_html() accepts max_positions parameter. Verified: Bull regime shows 'Skip or 1' correctly. All 3 dev-loop tasks done.
